name: thermoelectric-measurement-v1
description: A benchmark suite for the Phase-1 thermoelectric experimental loop, comparing broader versus more focused search spaces on measured power-factor feedback.
paper_hypothesis: Even before wet-lab automation, the Autolab workflow layer should preserve artifact/provenance quality while tighter thermoelectric search spaces improve measured power-factor outcomes under the same evaluation budget.

evaluation.reference_note: The measurement values in this benchmark come from deterministic synthetic CSV generation inside the csv_measurement stage. This is an orchestration and feedback benchmark, not an experimental claim.
